description: ov run agentCount undercounts because the coordinator never increments the runs.agent_count column — only ov sling does. Symptom: run.agentCount = N but sessions WHERE run_id=? returns N+1 (coordinator + children). Root file: src/commands/coordinator.ts (createRun without follow-up increment); contrast src/commands/sling.ts:1100,1212 which does increment. Affects ov run, ov run list, ov run show header, and ov serve /api/runs.
resolution: Either (A) call runStore.incrementAgentCount(runId) after store.upsert(session) in both coordinator headless and tmux paths in src/commands/coordinator.ts, OR (B preferred) derive agentCount via SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sessions WHERE run_id=? at read time and drop the cached column. Option B matches the reporter's acceptance criterion and prevents future drift when sessions are removed or purged.
